</mxCell> <mxCell id="staging-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;" value="STAGING / style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffbeb;strokeColor=#d97706;fontSize=10;align=left;spacing=6;verticalAlign=top;" value="<b>Schéma cible Parquet harmonisé :</b><br>timestamp (datetime) | line_id (str) | temperature (float) | pressure (float)<br>elapsed_time (float <i>nullable</i> — null sur C/D/E) | label (int 0/1)<br>ingestion_ts (datetime) | source_file_hash (str MD5)" div.div:
Schéma cible Parquet harmonisé :
timestamp (datetime) | line_id (str) | temperature (float) | pressure (float)
elapsed_time (float nullable — null sur C/D/E) | label (int 0/1)
ingestion_ts (datetime) | source_file_hash (str MD5)
